saCardDescription: Create and manage service accounts for automated API access. Service accounts use token-based authentication.
mcpCardDescription: Register and manage MCP (Model Context Protocol) clients for AI agent integration.
accessRequestCardDescription: Manage just-in-time access requests from service accounts.
saInactiveError: Service account is inactive. Reactivate it first.
saDeactivateWarning: Deactivating will immediately reject all existing tokens for this service account.
saDeleteWarning: This will also revoke all tokens. This action cannot be undone.
saNameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
saNameConflict: A service account with this name already exists
tokenRevokeWarning: This action cannot be undone. Any API clients using this token will lose access.
tokenLimitReached: Maximum tokens reached for this service account
tokenSecretWarning: This value cannot be shown again. Copy it now.
tokenValidationError: Invalid input. Check expiration date is in the future and within 365 days.
mcpClientSecretWarning: This secret cannot be shown again. Copy it now.
mcpDeleteWarning: Any connected AI agents will lose access. This action cannot be undone.
mcpRedirectUriRequired: At least one redirect URI is required
mcpRedirectUriInvalid: All URIs must use https:// or http://localhost
mcpNameConflict: A client with this name already exists
mcpDcrFieldsReadOnly: Client ID and redirect URIs are set at DCR registration time and cannot be changed.
arDenyWarning: The requesting service account will not receive access.
arAlreadyProcessed: This request has already been processed
arTokenLimitExceeded: Token limit reached. Revoke existing tokens first.
arJitTokenWarning: This token cannot be shown again. Copy it now.
arJitTokenTtl: This token expires when the approved scope's TTL elapses.
arCreateValidationError: Invalid input. Check the requested scopes.
arSaNotFound: Service account not found or inactive
arNoActiveSa: No active service accounts. Create one first.

delegation.title: Delegated Access
delegation.description: Share decrypted vault entries with MCP sessions for AI agent access.
delegation.confirmDescription: The following entries will be accessible to the MCP agent for the specified duration.
delegation.warning: Entry metadata (name, username) will be shared with the AI agent. Secrets are only accessible via the local decrypt agent.
delegation.noDecryptScope: This token does not have the credentials:list or credentials:use scope. Re-authorize the MCP client to enable delegation.
delegation.bannerActive: You have {count} active delegation(s) for AI agents.

mcpConnections.title: MCP Connections
mcpConnections.description: View and manage your authorized MCP client connections.
mcpConnections.revokeDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke this connection? The MCP client will no longer be able to access your account with this token.
mcpConnections.noClientsDescription: No MCP clients are registered in this tenant.
mcpConnections.noConnectionsDescription: You have not authorized any MCP clients yet.
mcpConnections.connectedUsers: {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}} connected
